parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'paid' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours') AS stuck_paid,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'created' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS abandoned_created,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'in_progress' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 hours') AS stuck_in_progress,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed' AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes') AS just_completed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled_after_payment' AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes') AS recent_refunds,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('completed', 'completed_with_review') AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' THEN (content->>'total')::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue_30min
FROM marketplace_order;

SELECT 
  o.id,
  o.status,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - o.updated_at))/3600, 1) AS hours_stuck,
  (o.content->>'total')::numeric / 100.0 AS total_eur,
  p.title AS product_title
FROM marketplace_order o
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT m.title FROM marketplace m 
  WHERE m.id = (o.content->'items'->0->>'id')::integer
  LIMIT 1
) p ON true
WHERE o.status IN ('paid', 'in_progress')
  AND o.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
ORDER BY o.updated_at ASC
LIMIT 5;
